ddls:
CREATE TABLE "portfolio_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specialty */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "country_of_operation" TEXT /* Country where the company operates */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date when the company was founded */,
  "ipo_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the company is publicly traded or not */,
  "fdv_stake" TEXT /* Percentage stake held by the investment firm as of January 2023 */,
  "revenue_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of revenue contribution for the fiscal year 2022 */,
  "ownership_stake_history" TEXT /* Ownership stake history over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_companies_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_companies_specialty_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_id") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment round */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio company associated with this investment round */,
  "round_type" TEXT /* Type of investment round (e.g., Seed, Series A) */,
  "amount_invested" TEXT /* Amount of money invested in this round */,
  "date_invested" TEXT /* Date when the investment was made */,
  "pre_money_valuation" TEXT /* Pre-money valuation of the company before the investment round */,
  "post_money_valuation" TEXT /* Post-money valuation of the company after the investment round */,
  "ownership_stake_acquired" TEXT /* Percentage of ownership stake acquired in this round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_rounds_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES portfolio_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio company */,
  "period_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal period */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue generated in the fiscal period */,
  "net_income" TEXT /* Net income reported in the fiscal period */,
  "ebitda" TEXT /* Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization */,
  "gross_margin" TEXT /* Gross margin percentage */,
  "operating_cash_flow" TEXT /* Operating cash flow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES portfolio_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region's market characteristics */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specialties" (
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialty */,
  "specialty_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specialty */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio company */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was made */,
  "amount_invested" TEXT /* Amount of money invested */,
  "ownership_stake_acquired" TEXT /* Percentage of ownership stake acquired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES portfolio_companies ("company_id")
)
